result.stdout:
USAGE:
    demo-cli.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    play <filepath>      Start demo using the given script file               
    script <filepath>    Scripts the demo commands using the given script file

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    demo-cli.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    play <filepath>      Start demo using the given script file               
    script <filepath>    Scripts the demo commands using the given script file

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    demo-cli.dll play <filepath> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <filepath>    FilePath to the script file to play

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information                              
    -b, --line-breaks    (true|false) Add line breaks before command arguments

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    demo-cli.dll play <filepath> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <filepath>    FilePath to the script file to play

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information                              
    -b, --line-breaks    (true|false) Add line breaks before command arguments

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    demo-cli.dll script <filepath> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <filepath>    FilePath to the script file to play

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                Prints help information                           
    -b, --line-breaks         (true|false) Add line breaks before command       
                              arguments                                         
    -p, --arguments-prefix    Add line breaks before command arguments. p.e. -p 
                              "  "                                              
    -t, --show-titles         (true|false) Add an 'echo' with the titles        
    -a, --bash-header         (true|false) Add the bash script header line at   
                              the begining of the script

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    demo-cli.dll script <filepath> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <filepath>    FilePath to the script file to play

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                Prints help information                           
    -b, --line-breaks         (true|false) Add line breaks before command       
                              arguments                                         
    -p, --arguments-prefix    Add line breaks before command arguments. p.e. -p 
                              "  "                                              
    -t, --show-titles         (true|false) Add an 'echo' with the titles        
    -a, --bash-header         (true|false) Add the bash script header line at   
                              the begining of the script
